/usr/bin/ar qc libzstd.a CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/common/entropy_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/common/error_private.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/common/fse_decompress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/common/xxhash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/common/zstd_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/fse_compress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/hist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/huf_compress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_compress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_compress_literals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_compress_sequences.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_compress_superblock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_double_fast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_fast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_lazy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_ldm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/compress/zstd_opt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/decompress/huf_decompress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/decompress/zstd_ddict.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/decompress/zstd_decompress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zstd.dir/decompress/zstd_decompress_block.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libzstd.a
